failure_signature: Deployment skill was auto-triggered by model when code appeared ready, but deployment should only happen with explicit user consent
remedy: Any skill with side effects (deploy, send message, publish, commit) should have disable-model-invocation: true. Consider converting to a hook if it must run at a specific lifecycle point.

failure_signature: TDD skill was optionally triggered but user wanted tests to run automatically before every commit, not just when explicitly asked
remedy: Test execution that must happen deterministically (before commits, on file save) should be implemented as a hook, not an optional skill.

failure_signature: security-audit skill was model-optional and skipped during urgent deployments, but security checks should be mandatory before any release
remedy: Security auditing must never be model-optional. Convert to a pre-deployment hook or CI gate. Skills with security implications should use disable-model-invocation: true at minimum.
